Chronic Conditions Warehouse Virtual Research Data Center 
TAF Demographic and Eligibility RIFs Codebook │ December 2025 │ V 1.8 
111 
LCKIN_TOS_CD_1 
LCKIN_TOS_CD_2 
LCKIN_TOS_CD_3 
LABEL: 
Lock-in Type of Service Codes (1–3) 
DESCRIPTION: The type(s) of service that are locked-in to a specific provider for the individual. The LCKIN_TOS_CD_1 
is related to LCKIN_PRVDR_ID_1 and LCKIN_PRVDR_TYPE_CD_1. 
SHORT NAME: LCKIN_TOS_CD_1 
LCKIN_TOS_CD_2 
LCKIN_TOS_CD_3 
LONG NAME: LCKIN_TOS_CD_1
